      • INCLUDES CHARACTER ACCESSORY: This Yoshi action figure includes a cap, sunglasses and satchel accessory, perfect for imaginative play and display inspired by your favourite Nintendo movie!
      • OFFICIAL SUPER MARIO GALAXY MOVIE: Inspired by the new Super Mario Galaxy Movie, this collectible Super Mario Yoshi Action Figure features a detailed articulated design and fun accessories

      2. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie

        JAKKS Pacific, Inc. is a leading designer, manufacturer and marketer of toys and consumer products sold throughout the world, with its headquarters in Santa Monica, California.       From the manufacturer

      Mario

      Mario has 22 points of articulation and comes with a yellow Luma

      Rosalina

      Rosalina has 10 points of articulation and comes with wand and stand

      Yoshi

      Yoshi has 20 points of articulation and comes with hat, sunglasses and satchel

      Bowser Jr.

      Bowser Jr. has 17 points of articulation and comes with paintbrush

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      See more reviews

      Top reviews from other countries

      Translate all reviews to English
      • Mads
        5.0 out of 5 stars Nice, but Parents beware the arms!
        Reviewed in the United States on 1 March 2026
        Colour Name: RosalinaVerified Purchase
        Great attention to detail in the paint, and designs on the crown. The sparkles on the dress are wonderful, and its a nice plastic for the most part. The only issue for her is her arms. The plastic joints for articulation on her arms at the shoulder and upper arm joints are VERY delicate. I ordered just to put her in my office, but a child playing could easily break her arm there if they get a but rough playing. Other than that, no small parts to break off which is nice, and the stand she comes with is removable, so parents could snap it on or take it off for how they see fit.
        Read more
        Report
      • Mariusz
        5.0 out of 5 stars Figurka Mario

        Colour Name: MarioVerified Purchase

        Translate review to English
      • Produto exatamente como descrito no anúncio. Funciona perfeitamente bem.
        5.0 out of 5 stars A entrega fez toda a diferença
        Reviewed in Brazil on 22 April 2026
        Colour Name: Bowser Jr.Verified Purchase
        O produto é bem maneiro . A entrega, como de costume, diz que a mercadoria já está no destino. Porém a entrega somente é efetivada três horas depois. Isso está acontecendo direto e não tenho com quem reclamar. Então, escrevo aqui.
        Read more
        Report

      About this Item

      • INCLUDES CHARACTER ACCESSORY: This Yoshi action figure includes a cap, sunglasses and satchel accessory, perfect for imaginative play and display inspired by your favourite Nintendo movie!
      • OFFICIAL SUPER MARIO GALAXY MOVIE: Inspired by the new Super Mario Galaxy Movie, this collectible Super Mario Yoshi Action Figure features a detailed articulated design and fun accessories
      • DETAILED AND ARTICULATED DESIGN: With 20 points of articulation and a detailed design inspired by The Super Mario Movie 2, this action figure is perfect for play and display
      • OFFICIALLY LICENSED: Officially licensed by Jakks Pacific, this Super Mario Galaxy collectible features quality construction and movie-accurate details
      • COLLECT THEM ALL: Also available from Jakks Pacific, look for Mario Jumbo Roto Plush, Luma Yo-Yo and Yoshi Egg Playset! Ideal for young fans and collectors of Super Mario

      Product description

      Product Description
      Collect your favorite characters in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie 5” Figure series. The Yoshi figure is inspired by the movie and comes with premium details including 20 points of articulation. Yoshi comes with hat, sunglasses, and satchel accessories, all showcased in window box. Wave 1 features Mario, Yoshi, Rosalina, and Bowser Jr. You can collect them all!
      Safety Warning
      Keep away from naked flame or direct heat source
